items.title: Theory of Reflexivity by George Soros
items.subtitle: A very important lecture from 2009
items.truncated_body_text: Back in last May, I already shared George Soros’s lecture after explaining multiple times since 2025 February why the 2025 April crash was the first sign of a changing world order, “weighing machine turned on”. And I keep referencing to this every week. Without this theory, it is simply impossible to understand how the cycles work, and to ‘mentally zoom…
